title: bauhinia buscalionii
intro: Bauhinia buscalionii, a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, is commonly known as the Philippine butterfly orchid tree. The medicinal properties of Bauhinia buscalionii lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Bauhinia buscalionii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Bauhinia buscalionii often involve the roots being dried and ground into a powder, which can then be used to make teas or infusions.
